classified.text: Terselamat pagi. Bank harapan dengan saya Amirul. Boleh saya bantu, encik?
Aku nak tahu kenapa ada tolak duit dari air kawan aku seratus sikit.
Orang ini pandai-pandai contoh tolak duit orang.
Harap bersabar, encik. Saya minta maaf atas kesultan ini.
Boleh saya dapatkan nomor kat pengenalan untuk saya makan?
Nak nomor kat pengenalan buat apa?
Cek jelah nama apa, Johan.
Aku dah telefon banyak kali. Takkan tak ada rekod.
Maaf, Encik Johan.
Prosedur keselamatan Bank memerlukan nomor kat pengenalan
untuk kami buka profil Encik.
Menusahkan betul.
Cepat sikit.
Terima kasih, Encik Johan.
Sementara saya simak transaksi terakhir, Encik.
Jangan suhu aku tunggu lama-lama.
Aku ada banyak kerja lain nak buat.
Bukan nak layan bank orang.
Baik, Encik.
Saya nampak ada penulakan 100 rigit
untuk charge tahunan kat credit, Encik.
Charge tahunan apa benda pula?
Aku dah guna kat ini 5 tahun.
Tak pernah ada charge tahunan.
Kau orang ini nak menipu ke?
Untuk maklumat, Encik,
pengetualian charge tahunan hanya untuk tiga tahun pertama.
Bermula tahun ke empat,
charge akan dikenakan.
Oh tak, kau!
Siapa yang cakap macam tu?
Masa aku reply dulu, agent korang cakap free semua hidup.
Saya faham ke keciwaan, Encik.
Saya boleh bantu hantar permohonan untuk membatalkan charge tersebut.
Tak payah nak hantar permohonan sangat.
Kau cancel je terus sekarang.
Kalau tak, aku tutup ekon agar ini juga.
Encik, proses pembatalan perlukan keleluisan pihak
Saya tidak boleh buat terus dari sistem saya.
Habis itu kau buat apa di situ? Angkat telefon je ke?
Panggil bos kau sekarang. Aku nak percakap dengan dia.
Baiklah, Cik. Saya akan sambungkan panggilan ini kepada pegawai atasan saya.
Mohon tunggu sebentar.
Sebab sikit. Jangan nak melinggal-linggalkan masa aku.

classified.text: Yeah, what do you want? This is Billy.
Hi, I am calling because my bill is twice as high
this month and I do not understand why.
Look, it's probably because you went over with your
data limit. Happens all the time. But I have an unlimited data plan. I checked my contract
before calling. Obviously, you don't or you wouldn't be charged. Do you have your account
number or are we just going to guess?
Wow, okay, there is no need to be rude. My account
number is 554321.
I'm not being rude. I'm just busy, right? Pulling it up now.
Yeah, like I said,
you bought three premium movies last week. That's why the bill is high.
I definitely did not buy any
movies. I was out of town all of last week.
Well, somebody in your house did. The system does not
lie. So you have to pay it.
I live alone. No one else has access to my account. Can you please check
the login locations?
I'm not technical support. I just handle billing. The charge is there so you
owe the money.
I'm not paying for something I did not buy. I want to speak to your supervisor right
now.
Look, my supervisor is going to tell you the exact same thing. It's a waste of time.
I don't care.
I want to speak to them. This is the worst customer service I have ever experienced.
Fine.
Whatever. Hold on and do not hang up because I'm not calling you back.
Unbelievable.
Just
transfer me already.
Yeah. Putting you in the queue. You might be waiting a while though. Bye.

classified.text: Helo? Hah, nak apa? Kuali khidmat pelanggan ni.
Selamat pagi.
Saya nak tanya pasal barang saya dah dua minggu tak sampai.
Status tulis dah hantar.
Dah tu? Kalau status tulis dah hantar, maninya dah hantarlah. Takkan tu pun nak kenal aja.
Masalahnya, saya tak terima apa-apa pun. Barang tu mahal kuat. Boleh tak tolong semak?
Bagilah nombor tracking tu. Nak semak macam mana kalau nombor pun tak pagi? Aduh, hai.
Nombor dia TR-99988.
Awak ni tak boleh kecakap iluk-iluk sikit, saya pelanggan tau.
Saya tengah banyak kerja ni, cik. Bukan cik sorang je pelanggan saya.
Okey, kejap. Saya tengok.
Ha ni sistem cakap Korea dah letak atas pagah rumah cik.
Pergilah cari kat luar ruh.
Saya dah cari satu rumah tak ada pun.
Tantar dia hantar salah rumah, kapa?
Analah saya tahu. Saya duduk pejabat. Bukan saya yang hantar barang tu.
Pergi call Korea tu sendiri.
Kan ni platform tempat saya beli barang, kenapa pula saya yang kena call Korea,
awak lah yang kena uruskan?
Anjik, tanggung jawab kita orang sampai barang tu keluar gudang je,
lepas tu pandai-pandailah Korea.
Ini tak masuk akal.
Saya nak buat aduan pasal servis awak.
Bagi saya nama penuh awak sekarang.
Buatlah aduan.
Inak saya takut ke?
Nama saya Rizal.
Ada apa-apa lagi nak marah-marah ni?
Kurang aja betul.
Saya nak cakap dengan pengurus awak.
Saya tak nak berusian dengan orang macam awak.
Pengurus tak ada.
dia sibuk nak tunggu tunggu lah tak nak tunggu letak je telefon tu
dia adak betul punya perhimatan pelanggan
iyalah iyalah bye

classified.text: Samap petang, pusat bantuan makan sini, saya cik.
Boleh saya bantu, cik?
Hello, cik.
Saya nak tanya pasal pesanan saya tadi.
Saya baru perasan ada barang yang tertinggal dalam plastik ini.
Minta maaf atas kesulitan tersebut, cik. Boleh saya dapatkan nombor pesanan cik untuk saya buat semakkan dalam sistem?
Nombo dia MS8821.
Saya pesan set nasi lemak ayam berempah dengan air sirap. Tapi ayamnya tak ada.
Nasi dengan sambal saja ada.
Macam mana nak makan macam ni?
Saya faham perasaan ujik. Saya pun akan kecewa kalau jadi macam ni.
Berdasarkan rekod pesanan ujik memang sepatutnya ada ayam.
Encik nak saya pulangkan duit, refund untuk bahagian ayam itu atau encik nak bauci untuk pesanan akan datang.
Kalau boleh, saya nak refund sahajalah. Sebab saya dah lapar sangat ni, kena beli makanan lain pula nanti.
Baiklah. Saya akan uruskan proses bayaran balik setemerta.
Proses ini akan mengambil masa dalam 24 jam untuk masuk semula ke dalam e-wallet ncik.
Okeylah. Kalau macam tu,
harap lepas ni pihak restoran lebih peka lah ya. Jangan cuai sangat bungkus makanan.
Betul ncik. Kami akan hantar maklum balas tegas kepada pihak restoran tesebut.
Ada apa-apa lagi yang boleh saya bantu?
Tak ada dah. Itu saja.
Terima kasih, Hia.
Sama-sama, Cik. Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami.

classified.text: Thank you for calling Silver Lining Insurance.
My name is Marcus.
To whom do I have the pleasure of speaking today?
Hi, Marcus. This is Sarah Jenkins.
I'm calling because a rock hit my windshield
on the highway this morning, and now there's a massive crack.
Sorry to hear that, Sarah. I'm glad you're safe.
Do you have your policy number handy so I can pull up your glass coverage details?
Yes, just a second.
It's 44920 Alpha.
I'm really worried because I have a long road
trip planned for tomorrow and I need this fixed immediately.
I understand the urgency.
Looking at your premier plan, you are fully covered for glass
repair with a zero dollar deductible. I can schedule a mobile technician to come to your
location this afternoon.
Oh, that would be a huge relief.
Does it matter that I'm at
my office and not at home?
Not at all. We just need the vehicle's location and
the contact number.
Shall I proceed with the booking for the 2PM slot?
Yes, please.
That works perfectly for me.
Thank you so much for making this easy.
It's my
pleasure, Sarah. I'm processing that now.
You'll receive a confirmation text
shortly.
Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

classified.text: Thank you for calling ConnectNet Technical Support. My name is Alex. How can I help you today?
My internet is down again. This is the third time this week and I am sick of it.
I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me pull up your account. Can I get your account number?
Are you kidding me? I just typed it into the automated system. Why do I have to repeat it to you?
I understand your frustration.
Sometimes the system does not pass the information over.
I just need it to access your router.
Fine. It is 987 -6543.
Hurry up! I work from home and I am losing money!
Thank you. Give me one moment while I run a diagnostic on your connection.
Whatever. Just fix it. Your company is a complete joke.
I am seeing a line error in your area. Our technicians are actually already working on a node nearby.
I do not care about nodes or line errors. I care about when I can get back online.
Give me a time.
The estimated time of resolution is within the next two hours.
Two hours? Are you out of your mind? I have a meeting in 20 minutes. This is unacceptable.
I sincerely apologize for the disruption. We can offer you a credit through the days you experienced outages.
Keep your stupid $5 credit. I want a manager right now.
I can certainly transfer you to the supervisor. Please hold on the line for a brief moment.
Do not put me on hold. Hello?
Hello?
Do not you dare put me on hold.
Sir, I have to place you on a brief hold to connect to the supervisor and will only be a minute.
If you put me on hold, I'm canceling my service today. I swear.
I'm transferring you now. Please stay on line.
You guys are absolutely useless.
